roles.content: Probability theory: A comprehensive examination of probability theory within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science

roles.content: Critical perspectives on probability theory: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to probability theory.
Recent developments in probability theory: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of probability theory in contemporary philosophy.
